join_order.probe: num (filtered: uom=USD, ddate BETWEEN 20230101-20231231, value NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Pre-built pre_join_index on (adsh,tag,version) via mmap. Zero build cost (P11). Anti-join: probe for existence only — no payload traversal. NOT found => row qualifies. Bounded probing with for-loop probe < pre_cap (C24). Hash function: hash_i32x3(adsh_code, tag_code, version_code). Sentinel: adsh_code == -1.

filters.notes: Zone-map on num.ddate: skip entire 65536-row blocks where max_ddate < 20230101 OR min_ddate > 20231231. Then recheck per row. Raw YYYYMMDD int32_t — no epoch conversion (C1 does NOT apply; ddate is raw int, NOT epoch days).
Load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime, find usd_code (int16_t). Compare uom_col[r] == usd_code. Never hardcode dict codes (C2).
NULL encoded as quiet_NaN. Test: std::isnan(value_col[r]). Apply after uom and ddate filters.

data_structures.anti_join: pre_built_index (mmap pre_join_index.bin, hash on (adsh_code,tag_code,version_code), cap=next_pow2(n_unique*2), slot=PreSlot 20 bytes, sentinel adsh_code==-1)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local open_addressing hash_map keyed by packed uint64_t ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)tag_code << 32 | (uint32_t)version_code), values: int64_t cnt + int64_t sum_cents (C29). Capacity: next_pow2(estimated_groups * 2). Sentinel: packed_key == UINT64_MAX (use std::fill, NOT memset (C20)). Thread-local then merge (P17/P20).
data_structures.topk_buffer: std::vector of result structs, std::partial_sort for LIMIT 100 (P6)

parallelism.notes: Partition zone-map blocks across threads. Each thread owns a thread-local aggregation hash map sized for full group cardinality (C9, not cardinality/nthreads). After barrier, single-threaded merge of thread-local maps into global result. Do NOT use shared aggregation map during scan (P17, P20).

indexes.notes: Layout: uint32_t num_blocks | ZMBlock[]{int32_t min_ddate, int32_t max_ddate, uint32_t row_count}. Skip block if max_ddate < 20230101 OR min_ddate > 20231231 (C19).

Layout: uint32_t cap | cap x PreSlot{adsh_code,tag_code,version_code,payload_offset,payload_count} | payload_pool[]. Parse header at function scope (C32): pre_cap=*(uint32_t*)raw; pre_mask=pre_cap-1; pre_ht=(PreSlot*)(raw+4). Anti-join: existence only, do NOT dereference payload_pool. Bounded probe loop: for(probe<pre_cap) (C24).

aggregates.type: int64_t cents (C29 HARD CONSTRAINT): iv=llround(v*100.0); sum_cents+=iv; output as sum_cents/100 + '.' + abs(sum_cents%100) with %02lld

aggregation.notes: Thread-local maps, single merge pass after OpenMP barrier (P17/P20). Sized to full group cardinality (C9, C15). Hash map key MUST include BOTH tag_code AND version_code (C15).

output.decode: tag_dict[tag_code].c_str(), version_dict[version_code].c_str() — load from num/tag_dict.txt and num/version_dict.txt (C18)

correctness_checklist: C2: Load uom/tag/version dict at runtime — never hardcode codes
C9: Hash map capacity = next_pow2(estimated_groups * 2); thread-local sized for FULL cardinality
C15: GROUP BY key includes BOTH tag_code AND version_code
C18: Decode tag/version codes via dict[] for output
C19: Zone-map skip ONLY on ddate (indexed); no skip on uom or value
C20: Use std::fill for sentinel init, NOT memset
C24: Bounded probe loop: for(probe=0; probe<pre_cap; ++probe)
C27/C32: All three pre_join_index header vars (pre_cap, pre_mask, pre_ht) declared at function scope before any loop
C29: SUM uses int64_t cents accumulator; output with %lld.%02lld
C31: Double-quote tag and version string output
C33: Stable tiebreaker tag_code ASC in partial_sort comparator
ddate: raw YYYYMMDD int32_t — integer comparison only, no date_utils.h
P17/P20: Thread-local aggregation maps, never shared map during scan
